feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: GitS thread
entry.content: Been watching GitS over the last few days getting myself hyped for the new series next month. They even have 2 episodes screening in theaters in a few weeks. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RE started with RE4
entry.content: classic RE >slowly move around at a snail's pace interacting with every piece of trash in the environment to see which are actually relevant for progression >clunky ass tank controls with constant camera shifts every two seconds (you'll walk down a single hallway and the camera will literally shift like 10 times) >oftentimes these camera perspectives obscure items or enemies from the player that would literally be seen by the actual in-game character >combat consists of just holding aim and pres

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Overclocking Help
entry.content: My DDR4 RAM will not boot past 2400MHz in gear 1. 2400MHz runs completely stable, can play games, run benchmarks, no crashes or anything. I bump it to 2500 and it won't boot. I've heard gear 2 is required for super high clocks but this should be nowhere near it right? I should at least be able to run the 3500 XMP profile in gear 1 but nope. I've bumped all the necessary voltages and loosened the timings but no matter how much voltage I give or how loose I make the timings it just WILL NOT boot u

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8379 Sassy Fox Edition Previous Thread: >>83457012 F-lis…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8379 Sassy Fox Edition Previous Thread: >>83457012 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Now what?
entry.content: > sudden IPO rush > Fabble 5 was a nothing burger, despite being larger > diminishing returns point reached, no more new data, hardware doesn't scale horizontally anymore, bigger models too slow > still not profitable long term > each new model iteration gets more hallucinations % > AHI (Artificial Habsburg Intelligence) is already here > no real improvement since sonnet 3.5 release in 2024, besides benchmaxing > plagiarized harness scripts and MCP trash from random public github repos (LMAO) ar

entry.title: /g/ Technology: its easier to deal with an old laptop
entry.content: if you want to try "obscure" hardware, that is obscure due to being too old not really supported anymore, laptops is the best bet year 2000 IBM laptop: -S3 GPU (whole company is no longer around) -Pentium 3 CPU (doesnt support modern CPU instructions, modern Linux is a no go, OpenBSD works) -IDE HDD controller, non-SATA now try to find P3, S3, stuff as a desktop? 404, not found.

HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity.
